description: Graphic formatted as a reproduction of a Blaze Media online news article, on a cream background. At the top is the black 'Blaze media' logo with its flame mark. Below it is the article's photo: a woman in glasses and a cream blazer seated at a table speaking into a microphone, with the U.S. flag and another flag behind her and a name placard in front. The photo credit reads 'Photo by Anna Moneymaker/Getty Images'. A red section label 'POLITICS' sits beneath, followed by the large black serif headline 'Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown'.
notable_text: Blaze media; POLITICS; Project Firewall: DOL targets visa sponsors in unprecedented H-1B enforcement crackdown
